# kissfft

A mixed-radix Fast Fourier Transform library.

- **Upstream:** <https://github.com/mborgerding/kissfft>
- **Version:** commit `febd4caeed32e33ad8b2e0bb5ea77542c40f18ec` (v131.1.0)
- **License:** BSD-3-Clause (see `COPYING`)

Only the core FFT and real-FFT source files used by kaldi-native-fbank are
included here (`kiss_fft.c`, `kiss_fftr.c`, and their headers).
